prompt_en: 64x64 pixel art seamless tile, dark stone or wooden texture, common rarity background for inventory slot, muted grays and charcoal tones #5a5a5a #3a3a3a, no glow no sparkle no magical effects, flat minimal style, retro RPG aesthetic, dark fantasy atmosphere, realistic stone or wood grain pattern, tileable repeating texture
negative_prompt: bright colors, glow, sparkle, shine, magical effects, neon, oversaturated, high contrast, photorealistic, detailed, ornate patterns, gold accents, cyan, blue, gradient
style_notes: Common rarity = plain, utilitarian materials. Grayscale/muted grays match base inventory UI. No magical indicators. Stone or weathered wood fits dark fantasy medieval setting. Seamless tile constraint is critical — edges must repeat without visible seams.
